name: Generate Tailwind - Dashboard Layout
description: Test code generation: complex Tailwind dashboard with grid and responsive
prompt:
Tulis HTML dengan Tailwind CSS untuk dashboard layout:
- Sidebar: fixed, w-64, h-screen, bg-gray-900, text-white
- Main content: ml-64, p-8, bg-gray-100, min-h-screen
- Top bar di main: flex, justify-between, items-center, mb-8
- Grid stats: grid, grid-cols-1, md:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-4, gap-6
- Setiap stat card: bg-white, rounded-xl, shadow-sm, p-6
- 4 stat cards dengan title dan value

Pada breakpoint lg (large), berapa kolom yang ditampilkan di grid stats?
